description: Human-curated balance-relevant patches for stats boundaries and per-civ tooltips.

patches.title: Update 162286
generalChanges: Chicken food 65 → 75
Eagle Warrior cost 25f 50g → 20f 50g
Gambesons cost 100f 100g → 50f 100g
Traction Trebuchet reload 9s → 11s, bonus vs buildings 175 → 230, speed 0.6 → 0.57
9 new random maps added

patches.title: Update 169123

Hindustanis: Steppe Lancers lose team bonus +2 vs buildings
Incas: Lose Eagle Warriors, Lumber/Mining Camps, Mills
Koreans: Turtle Ship cost reduced, Elite attack/armor buffed
Portuguese: Carrack tech removed, new Circumnavigation tech
Vikings: Gain Fire Ships, lose Demolition Ships

generalChanges: Naval Overhaul: new Hulk-line counters Fire Ships
Fire Ships now deal only melee damage
New Catapult Galleon ship type
Fishing Ship HP/armor/gather rate nerfed, can garrison in Docks
New Fishing Lines tech, Gillnets reworked
Trade Cogs can trade for gold, wood, or both
All military ship speeds -5%
Fortified Church range 6 → 4, lose bonus vs buildings
Siege Tower HP 220 → 175, lose garrison speed bonus
Fire Lancer cost/train time increased, lose ranged melee attack
Skirmisher +2 vs Mamelukes
Slinger reworked: cost/stats/bonuses changed
Watch Tower-line ship bonus reduced

Incas: Champi Scout +1 vs Cavalry/Camels, +2 vs Shock Infantry
Champi Runner loses bonus vs buildings, upgrade cost increased
Mapuche: Settlement train times increased: Skirm 52 → 56s, Elite Skirm 33 → 36s, Spear 44 → 47s, Pike 33 → 36s
Champi Scout +1 vs Cavalry/Camels, +2 vs Shock Infantry
Champi Runner loses bonus vs buildings, upgrade cost increased
Muisca: Champi Scout +1 vs Cavalry/Camels, +2 vs Shock Infantry
Champi Runner loses bonus vs buildings, upgrade cost increased
Tupi: Curare Blackwood Archer poison 3 → 2 damage over 15s
Dead unit refund fixed to 15% total cost
Champi Scout +1 vs Cavalry/Camels, +2 vs Shock Infantry
Champi Runner loses bonus vs buildings, upgrade cost increased

patches.title: Update 177723

Aztec: Xolotl Warrior now affected by Garland Wars, Herbalism, Caciques
Incas: Xolotl Warrior now affected by Fabric Shields
Mapuche: Xolotl Warrior now affected by Butalmapu
Mayans: Xolotl Warrior now affected by Holcans

generalChanges: Dock arrows phased by age: 0/3/4/5
Dock anti-ship bonus phased by age: +0/2/3/4
Tower-line anti-ship bonus reduced by 1 each
Sea Tower anti-ship +8 → +5
